channel.title: OTLP on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in OTLP on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Ingest OTLP signals into Azure Monitor with the OpenTelemetry Collector
item.description:
Azure Monitor now generally supports native ingestion of OTLP signals. OpenTelemetry-instrumented applications and platforms can send telemetry directly to Azure Monitor.

  • Source: Azure Updates
